testcase.name: test_apk_add_ucert

failure.message: subprocess.TimeoutExpired: Command '['ssh', '-x', '-o', 'LogLevel=ERROR', '-o', 'PasswordAuthentication=no', '-F', 'none', '-o', 'ControlPath=/tmp/lg-ssh-87dvshu_/control-127.0.0.1', '-p', '48159', '-l', 'root', '127.0.0.1', 'apk', 'add', 'ucert']' timed out after 30 seconds

testcase.failure:
self = <test_apk.TestApk object at 0x7f36b3755810> ssh_command = SSHDriver(target=Target(name='main', env=Environment(config_file='targets/qemu-libremesh-x86-64.yaml')), name=None, st...derr_merge=False, connection_timeout=120.0, explicit_sftp_mode=False, explicit_scp_mode=True, username='', password='')
@pytest.mark.skipif( os.getenv("LG_FEATURE_ONLINE") is None, reason="LG_FEATURE_ONLINE not defined" ) def test_apk_add_ucert(self, ssh_command): try: > ssh_command.run_check("apk add ucert")

self = <Popen: returncode: None args: ['ssh', '-x', '-o', 'LogLevel=ERROR', '-o', '...> endtime = 559.350562135, orig_timeout = 30, stdout_seq = [] stderr_seq = [b'wgetFailed to send request: Operation not permitted\n', b'ERROR: wget: exited with error 4\nWARNING: updating and opening https://downloads.openwrt.org/snapshots/packages/x86_64/routing/packages.adb: unexpected end of file\n'] skip_check_and_raise = False
def _check_timeout(self, endtime, orig_timeout, stdout_seq, stderr_seq, skip_check_and_raise=False): """Convenience for checking if a timeout has expired.""" if endtime is None: return if skip_check_and_raise or _time() > endtime: > raise TimeoutExpired( self.args, orig_timeout, output=b''.join(stdout_seq) if stdout_seq else None, stderr=b''.join(stderr_seq) if stderr_seq else None) E subprocess.TimeoutExpired: Command '['ssh', '-x', '-o', 'LogLevel=ERROR', '-o', 'PasswordAuthentication=no', '-F', 'none', '-o', 'ControlPath=/tmp/lg-ssh-87dvshu_/control-127.0.0.1', '-p', '48159', '-l', 'root', '127.0.0.1', 'apk', 'add', 'ucert']' timed out after 30 seconds
